landing.subtitle: E-Commerce platform for PC hardware enthusiasts. Complete with automatic Compatibility Checker and real-time TDP Wattage Calculation to ensure your custom rig is stable and ready.

features.compat_desc: No more wrong orders. Automatically filters matching CPU sockets, motherboard form factors, and RAM types.
features.tdp_desc: Calculates cumulative thermal design power and filters reliable Power Supplies with a 20% safety headroom.
features.uat_desc: Track assembly progress in 4 real-time steps with thermal burn-in reports logged directly by technicians.

builder.title: System Configuration
builder.subtitle: Build your dream computer with real-time specification matching and wattage tracking
builder.tdp_safety_warning: ⚠️ Safety limit exceeded! Choose a higher capacity PSU.
builder.alert_copied: Build shared to community gallery successfully!
builder.select_hardware_desc: Select the hardware item to install in your build

compat_rules.socket_idle: Please select CPU and Motherboard to analyze socket compatibility
compat_rules.power_idle: Select components and Power Supply to verify wattage safety limits
compat_rules.clearance_idle: Select Graphics Card and Case to verify physical size clearance
compat_rules.socket_match: Compatible: Both CPU and Motherboard use matching {{cpuSocket}} socket
compat_rules.socket_mismatch: Socket mismatch: CPU uses {{cpuSocket}} but Motherboard has {{mbSocket}} slot! Cannot assemble.
compat_rules.power_overload: Wattage limit exceeded! Components require at least ~{{totalTdp}}W but PSU only supplies {{psuWattage}}W
compat_rules.power_warning: Load percentage is high at {{loadPercentage}}% of PSU capacity. Recommend upgrading PSU for a 20% safety headroom.
compat_rules.power_match: Power safe: Estimated cumulative TDP is ~{{totalTdp}}W from a {{psuWattage}}W PSU (only {{loadPercentage}}% load)
compat_rules.power_need_psu: Selected components require at least ~{{totalTdp}}W. Recommend choosing a PSU with at least {{recommendedWattage}}W capacity
compat_rules.clearance_mismatch: GPU length ({{gpuLength}}mm) exceeds maximum clearance limit supported by the chassis ({{caseLimit}}mm)!
compat_rules.clearance_match: Clearance OK: GPU length ({{gpuLength}}mm) fits inside the case limit ({{caseLimit}}mm)
